introSection: Viking Roller Coaster is a steel spinning wild mouse roller coaster located at Energylandia in Zator, Małopolskie, Poland. It opened on 14 July 2014.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: Single car trains. Riders are arranged 4 across in a single row for a total of 4 riders per car.

fullText:
Viking Roller Coaster is a steel spinning wild mouse roller coaster located at Energylandia in Zator, Małopolskie, Poland. It opened on 14 July 2014.



Single car trains. Riders are arranged 4 across in a single row for a total of 4 riders per car.
